tweets.text: During #PeaceCorpsWeek2022, we commemorate the establishment of the @PeaceCorps in 1961, and recognize the many ways volunteers have made a difference at home and abroad.

.@StateDeptSpox: Today, the U.S. joins the @UN Human Rights Council at the Council’s 49th regular session, fulfilling a pledge made by @POTUS. On March 1, @SecBlinken will address the Council. https://t.co/DG8qvDcyF3 https://t.co/A581F6KbzV
.@StateDeptSpox: We have advised American citizens to consider departing Russia immediately on commercial options still available. https://t.co/A3CUcazxxp https://t.co/oYwHkMU5nM

.@StateDeptSpox: .@StateDept and @USAID announced the additional provision of nearly $54 million in humanitarian assistance to those affected by the Russian government's invasion. We stand in solidarity with and will continue to support the government and the people of Ukraine. https://t.co/8uBN6YubdG

.@StateDeptSpox: Over the weekend, @SecBlinken authorized an assistance package of up to $350 million for immediate support to Ukraine's defense, bringing total security assistance over the past calendar year to more than $1 billion in support of Ukraine's front-line defenders. https://t.co/2FiDLmC2DC

.@StateDeptSpox: As President Putin continues his premeditated, unprovoked, unjustified, and unlawful war against Ukraine, the United States, along with our Allies and partners around the world, will continue to hold the Russian government accountable. https://t.co/PP53HAEu9I
Live now! @StateDeptSpox Ned Price briefs reporters from the State Department. Also streaming live on https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/Zq9re84xLD. https://t.co/UyWxvs63qD

The @UN Environment Assembly 5.2 begins today. U.S. efforts to combat ocean plastic pollution continue as we work with other nations and stakeholders to reduce, reuse, and recycle plastics and address plastic waste. #UNEA https://t.co/ndplsHhOyx

Plastic pollution that enters the ocean is indifferent to political boundaries. This week at the @UN Environment Assembly 5.2, the United States is working with our counterparts to find innovative solutions to this global problem. #UNEA https://t.co/YNEgP40nPw

Many humanitarian organizations are providing urgent assistance to those affected by the crisis in Ukraine. Here are some ways you can help from wherever you are:
https://t.co/1NlBjaNeVF
Allies and partners matter. https://t.co/BIPDAtANJM  #UnitedWithUkraine
Many humanitarian organizations are providing urgent assistance to those affected by the crisis in Ukraine. Here are some ways you can help from wherever you are: https://t.co/1NlBjb4Qkf

.@USAmbUN on February 25: Let us never forget that this is a war of choice. Russia's choice. Russia chose to invade its neighbor. Russia chose to inflict untold suffering – on the Ukrainian people and on its own citizens. Russia chose to violate Ukraine's sovereignty. https://t.co/LiRYq8hlzM

Today’s actions will ensure that these select Russian banks are disconnected from the international financial system and harm their ability to operate globally. We stand with the Ukrainian people in this dark hour. #UnitedWithUkrain

.@POTUS said the United States would impose swift and severe consequences if Russia invaded Ukraine. Today, the United States, Canada, and our European Allies announced that select Russian banks will be removed from SWIFT. Joint Statement: https://t.co/rPaSgyNegn
Imagine eight years living in fear and fighting to save your loved ones. This is Andriana's story. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/omJMsdILFI

The United States continues to #StandWithUkraine in the face of renewed Russian aggression and on this 8th anniversary of Russia's occupation and invasion of Crimea, we again affirm that Crimea is Ukraine. #UnitedWithUkraine
This is a war Putin created, and he and his cronies are responsible. #StopTheLies #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/KGhTj78mXf
Many humanitarian organizations are providing urgent assistance to those affected by the crisis in Ukraine. Here are some ways you can help from wherever you are: https://t.co/1NlBjb4Qkf
Народу России: вы не заслуживаете бессмысленной войны со своими соседями, друзьями и родственниками в Украине. https://t.co/mMR4voNuUw

Many humanitarian organizations are providing urgent assistance to those affected by the crisis in Ukraine. Here are some ways you can help from wherever you are:
https://t.co/1NlBjb4Qkf
.@USAmbUN: Russia exercised its veto power today in an effort to protect Russia’s premeditated, unprovoked, unjustified, and unconscionable war in Ukraine. https://t.co/Ddqf71F5Ec

.@USAmbUN: Let us never forget that this is a war of choice. Russia's choice. Russia chose to invade its neighbor. Russia chose to inflict untold suffering – on the Ukrainian people and on its own citizens. Russia chose to violate Ukraine's sovereignty. https://t.co/6ql9a4xZNK
This is a war Putin created, and he and his cronies are responsible. #StopTheLies #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/PS2vs4WbBi

Putin wants the world to travel back in time. To a time before the United Nations. To a time when empires ruled the world. But the rest of the world has moved forward. It is not 1919. It is 2022. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/t9UUtY6Z6a
.@StateDeptSpox: We stand united with our @NATO Allies and partners in Europe and around the world on confronting the Russian government and holding Putin to account. https://t.co/esQbIQFDlb
.@StateDeptSpox: The people of Russia are not our enemy. We hold President Putin and his cronies responsible for this war, not them. https://t.co/6D50t5ezr5
.@StateDeptSpox: The United States reaffirms that Crimea is Ukraine. https://t.co/UKgA0rQYYg

.@StateDeptSpox: Moscow is resorting to outright lies in an effort to weaken the resolve of Ukraine’s military and its people. These tactics are classic intimidation and synonymous with the Kremlin--They are unacceptable. https://t.co/9rHlWKTuLG

.@StateDeptSpox: The American people are standing with the people of Ukraine as they suffer an unjustified, unprovoked, and premeditated attack by Russia’s military forces. We will not falter in our resolute support for Ukraine’s sovereignty and territorial integrity. https://t.co/WAVnRb5fzw
Live now! @StateDeptSpox Ned Price briefs reporters from the State Department. Also streaming live on https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/Fbj9DtJvjB. https://t.co/DvXTbnWNcG

President Biden: The Ukrainian people have known 30 years of independence — and they have shown that they will not tolerate anyone who tries to take their country backwards. Read @POTUS's full remarks: https://t.co/klSJmXjXdp.

This week, the United States partnered with @gavi #COVAX and the African Vaccine Acquisition Trust to donate more than 3.7 million COVID-19 vaccine doses to five countries in Africa. https://t.co/A4aG80QSBH
.@UN countries to Russia: It’s not 1919. It’s 2022. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/U8QxY5RPjN

.@SecBlinken: This is the greatest threat to security in Europe since World War II. Ukraine is in danger. President Putin is blatantly and violently breaking the laws and principles that have kept the peace across Europe and around the world for decades. https://t.co/E28ubxLTkU https://t.co/UUtCUqD8nC

.@POTUS: The entire world sees clearly what Putin and his Kremlin are really all about. This was never about genuine security concerns. It was always about naked aggression. About Putin’s desire for empire— by any means necessary. https://t.co/RNG1UIuZ9a

.@POTUS: Within hours of Russia unleashing its assault— @NATO came together and authorized the activation of response plans. This will enable NATO’s high-readiness forces to deploy when and where they are needed— to protect our NATO Allies on the eastern boundaries of Europe. https://t.co/aljBQ20rUv
.@POTUS: If Russia pursues cyber attacks against our companies – or critical infrastructure – we are prepared to respond. https://t.co/KQIe15n2Kf
.@POTUS on Russian aggression: "In the contest  between democracy and autocracy— between sovereignty and subjugation— make no mistake: Freedom will prevail." https://t.co/NXymCSGWTC

.@POTUS: Our forces are NOT going to Europe to fight in Ukraine—but to defend our @NATO Allies. As I made crystal clear, the United States will defend every inch of NATO territory with the full force of American power. NATO is more united—and more determined than ever. https://t.co/6XMS9SbvvV
.@POTUS: Putin is the aggressor. Putin chose this war. And now – he will bear the consequences. https://t.co/Ih0wmFKtFl
Live now! @POTUS delivers remarks on Russia’s unprovoked and unjustified attack on Ukraine. https://t.co/lOAUjDzI0c
.@POTUS remarks on Russia's unprovoked and unjustified attack on Ukraine now scheduled for 1:30 p.m. EST.
Today at approximately 12:30 p.m. EST, @POTUS will deliver remarks on Russia’s unprovoked and unjustified attack on Ukraine. Watch live here, https://t.co/58Uc9lZRv7, and https://t.co/NBt2KDCDYY.

The U.S. welcomes @EU_Commission sanctions on Russia to impose consequences for its actions in Ukraine. The U.S. and Europe are united in responding to Russia's aggression in Ukraine, and we will continue to work in lockstep with our Allies and partners. #UnitedWithUkraine
Our Allies and partners are united in our resolve to support Ukraine and impose consequences for Russia’s blatant disregard for Ukrainian sovereignty. Together with Canada, we are #UnitedWithUkraine.

.@StateDeptSpox: Where do we go from here? Moscow needs to demonstrate that it’s serious about diplomacy. Russia’s actions over the last 48 hours have demonstrated the opposite: If Moscow’s approach changes, we remain ready to engage. We remain open to diplomacy. https://t.co/qcvmEL1m4A
#UnitedWithUkraine
Live now! @StateDeptSpox Ned Price briefs reporters from the State Department. Also streaming live on https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/BjjrwVNwQd. https://t.co/v6q5d7kaun

The Roadmap for a Renewed U.S.-Canada Partnership, launched by @POTUS and Prime Minister @JustinTrudeau one year ago, guides our bilateral partnership based on our countries' steadfast commitment to democratic values and international cooperation. https://t.co/BxP5QNNxIE

So far in February, the United States has delivered over 12 million doses of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine to Bangladesh via #COVAX. We are not done yet, as more lifesaving vaccine donations are on their way. Together we can end the pandemic.

.@SecBlinken on his planned meeting with Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov: Now that we see the invasion is beginning and Russia has made clear its wholesale rejection of diplomacy, it does not make sense to go forward with that meeting at this time. https://t.co/lUyVogR28P

.@SecBlinken on the Nord Stream 2 pipeline and @NATO defenses: Just as the President said we would do, today @DeptofDefense announced that we would be sending additional forces to NATO’s eastern flank to deter and defend against any Russian aggression directed at our Allies. https://t.co/m91yYx1tWb
The @UN has a united message for Russia: return to the table and let us work towards a diplomatic solution. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/WjSXywfpDv

Diplomacy is the only responsible solution. @USAmbUN Thomas-Greenfield is working diligently with our partners in the @UN to bring Russia back to the diplomatic table. https://t.co/AOhORVuY8A https://t.co/IvWwN0ijcX
The United States is unwavering in our support for Ukraine. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/F2mezqqj89

.@SecBlinken on Russia sanctions: For weeks, we've been warning the world that Russia was mobilizing for military aggression against Ukraine…Now that Russia has moved against Ukraine, so too have we moved on our strong and unified response. https://t.co/U54WFylMIf

.@USAmbUN Linda Thomas-Greenfield: In essence, Putin wants the world to travel back in time. To a time before the United Nations. To a time when empires ruled the world. But the rest of the world has moved forward. It is not 1919. It is 2022. https://t.co/kxEb1nIMga
Live now! @SecBlinken holds a joint press availability with Ukrainian Foreign Minister @DmytroKuleba, also streaming on https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/xLLydyhUDy. https://t.co/EwvQ2s8eUH

.@POTUS announces sanctions on Russia: “This is the beginning of a Russian invasion of Ukraine… a flagrant violation of international law, and it demands a firm response from the international community.” https://t.co/lBXQz8LzFf

Live now! @POTUS provides an update on Russia and Ukraine.
 https://t.co/IY8EA651Eo
We recommend U.S. citizens in Ukraine depart immediately. Statement from @SecBlinken: https://t.co/rNqPU3UyF8 | Additional information: https://t.co/XELXbbSmLi.

.@SecBlinken: "Our support for Ukraine’s sovereignty and territorial integrity as well as for the government and people of Ukraine is unwavering.  We stand with our Ukrainian partners in strongly condemning President Putin’s announcement." https://t.co/0nVTomqgyX

Happy #PresidentsDay. This Presidents’ Day we celebrate all American presidents, past and present. More on this U.S. holiday and a few of our presidents from @ShareAmerica: https://t.co/qirj09freI. https://t.co/8ZeKXlL8sl

Even Russian President Vladimir Putin has said that every country has a right to choose the way it ensures its security. The United States and our allies and partners stand #UnitedWithUkraine. https://t.co/OJSLUfB1ld

In partnership with #COVAX, the U.S. delivered 2.2 million additional Pfizer vaccine doses to the Egyptian people, bringing our total delivered to Egypt to 23.5 million. We are working with global partners @gavi to ensure equitable distribution of safe and effective vaccines.
The United States and our @NATO Allies and partners are aligned and ready to respond. #UnitedWithUkraine. https://t.co/ATma2Cjz2M

Today, @SecBlinken appeared on @CNNsotu, @FaceTheNation, and @MeetThePress to discuss the situation in Ukraine. Read more: 

CNN: https://t.co/RofMHplbCb
CBS:https://t.co/iqTJxiQ64N
NBC:https://t.co/Z3lOBNdwzv
The United States joins Ukraine and our other partners and Allies in calling for Russia to stop its aggression.

To date, the United States has donated nearly 57 million COVID-19 vaccine doses to Pakistan through #COVAX -- and this week, Pakistan administered its 200 millionth vaccine dose! Through our partnership on vaccination efforts, we can end the pandemic. https://t.co/1bqHicVcJy

The United States has already provided over 2.5 million of the 5 million Johnson & Johnson COVID-19 vaccine doses donated to the African Vaccine Acquisition Trust, an initiative designed by Africa for Africa. https://t.co/fXfBvlMb0o

The COVID-19 Global Action plan will help our allies and partners close gaps in current COVID-19 response efforts, identify where and how needs can be best met, and help the world prepare against future pandemics. Read more here: https://t.co/OvUEAvloSg https://t.co/cPEwgoceOm
The #G7 is rallying the world's democracies to deliver for our people and meet the world's biggest challenges, while demonstrating our shared values. https://t.co/N108zI3yK4

Why should Americans and the world care about what’s happening in Ukraine? Listen to Nataliya’s story and hear how she works every day to help her fellow Ukrainians who have been displaced. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/o2fnqVBpuK

Even Russian President Vladimir Putin has said that every country has a right to choose the way it ensures its security. The United States and our allies and partners stand #UnitedWithUkraine. https://t.co/ehjVbR5rf8

.@POTUS: To the citizens of Russia: You are not our enemy.  And I do not believe you want a bloody, destructive war against Ukraine — a country and a people with whom you share such deep ties of family, history, and culture. https://t.co/K6usU8L4h1

.@SecBlinken: The basic principles that sustain peace and security – principles that were enshrined in the wake of two world wars and a Cold War – are under threat. https://t.co/YzTqx4C7g1 https://t.co/7J31L0JTTd
.@SecBlinken: The Russian Government can announce today – with no qualification, equivocation, or deflection – that Russia will not invade Ukraine. https://t.co/D8nfDENxaO

Why should Americans and the world care about what’s happening in Ukraine? Listen to Nataliya’s story and hear how she works every day to help her fellow Ukrainians who have been displaced. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/Z4u8Kc2m8z

Another HBCU Foreign Policy Conference hosted by @EngageState in the books! Thank you to the speakers, participants, and all those who made it a success. We hope to see you next year. https://t.co/kko9AKrN5S #HBCUsAtState
.@POTUS: Russia can still choose diplomacy. It is not too late to de-escalate and return to the negotiating table. https://t.co/kxBchQV88e

.@SecBlinken: “The basic principles that sustain peace and security – principles that were enshrined in the wake of two world wars and a Cold War – are under threat." https://t.co/PVuvsMpKkF https://t.co/ipeb8G4MUT

For the past two days, @EngageState has hosted the 13th Annual Virtual HBCU Foreign Policy Conference. Learn #WhyHBCUsMatter and read how a few employees found their way to the Department in part 2 of our DipNote. Their stories here: https://t.co/EzwhnGnWKp
For more of the 13th Annual HBCU Foreign Policy Conference, being held virtually, visit https://t.co/pamfzJIkYM. #HBCUsAtState https://t.co/jUBQZc6vXk
.@SecBlinken: We must address what Russia is doing right now to Ukraine…Russia says it’s drawing down forces. We do not see that happening on the ground. https://t.co/Gq0h1pI9xo
.@SecBlinken: There is another choice Russia can still make, if there is any truth to its claim that it is committed to diplomacy. https://t.co/18BaNLAgMg

Live now! @SecBlinken participates in a moderated discussion with German Foreign Minister Annalena Baerbock at the Munich Security Conference. Also streaming live on https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/DLP9tz7bZN.  https://t.co/011zHhIYg0

Watch day two of the 13th Annual Virtual HBCU Foreign Policy Conference starting today at 9 a.m. EST with opening remarks by @StateDeputySpox on https://t.co/XcdNSvQDf8. #HBCUsAtState https://t.co/lL4KKZWVjh
.@SecBlinken before the @UN Security Council speaking on the Russia-Ukraine crisis: “Let me be clear: I am here today, not to start a war, but to prevent one.” https://t.co/Cl7Cm36zBh

.@SecBlinken: “To address many of the challenges that democracies face, from inequity to corruption to efforts by authoritarian governments to sow distrust in free and open societies, we’ve got to have strong democratic partners by our side.” More: https://t.co/QyLDsKFKKG

The U.S. continues to support countries in their fight against COVID-19 through vaccine donations. With more than 212,000 doses delivered to our Caribbean friends & neighbors this week, we are one step closer to saving lives and ending the pandemic in the Caribbean and globally. https://t.co/4VO6eEEy3b

Chief Diversity and Inclusion Officer Ambassador Gina Abercrombie-Winstanley joined @mitchellreports this week to discuss the American Diplomat film with Director @LeolaCalz, sharing how we will do diplomacy smarter and better through a more diverse workforce.

.@SecBlinken: “This is a moment of peril for the lives and safety of millions of people, as well as for the foundation of the @UN Charter and the rules-based international order that preserves stability worldwide.” Full remarks: https://t.co/PVuvsM88W5. https://t.co/GKxroSwvsv
.@POTUS: We’re not targeting the people of Russia. We do not seek to destabilize Russia. https://t.co/8oGCDE8lql

.@POTUS on diplomacy with Russia: As long as there is hope of a diplomatic resolution that prevents the use of force and avoids the incredible human suffering that would follow, we will pursue it. https://t.co/MBX1mTGB0v
.@POTUS: Nations have a right to sovereignty and territorial integrity. They have the freedom to set their own course and choose with whom they will associate. https://t.co/BTF9VWPnwa
Watch @SecBlinken’s full remarks at today’s @UN Security Council meeting. https://t.co/6xDV0ON99J
.@SecBlinken: The Russian government can announce today–with no qualification, equivocation, or deflection–that Russia will not invade Ukraine. https://t.co/lWLhzL27oP

.@SecBlinken: Let me be clear: I am here today, not to start a war, but to prevent a war. The information I’ve presented here is validated by what we’ve seen unfolding in plain sight before our eyes for months. https://t.co/O8STgiN47K

Live now! Watch @SecBlinken deliver remarks on Russia’s threat to peace and security, at a @UN Security Council Meeting in New York City. Also streaming live on https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/BPwgbfWL0X. https://t.co/yxKDQ9Uy0h

.@SecBlinken will deliver remarks on Russia’s threat to peace and security at a @UN Security Council Meeting. Watch live at approximately 10 a.m. EST today here and on https://t.co/58Uc9lZRv7. https://t.co/CMBeV0FjFG

Our #BHM trailblazer of the day is Ebenezer Bassett, a champion of human rights who advocated for the civil rights of African Americans and Black Caribbean nations. FACT: Bassett was America’s first African American Chief of Mission. https://t.co/4A1vEY2YBI https://t.co/YNKxX6o7Zz

This month @EngageState will be hosting the 13th Annual HBCU Foreign Policy Conference on February 17-18. Check out our latest DipNote on #WhyHBCUsMatter and read how a few employees found their way to the Department. Their stories here: https://t.co/A3FUXKPDxF.

The Department is pleased to announce Dilawar Syed as the new Special Representative for Commercial and Business Affairs. He will work to advance trade, commercial, and economic policies, and support the export activities of U.S. companies. https://t.co/qKqyusrgNJ

The Indo-Pacific is the most dynamic region in the world, and its future affects people everywhere. The United States is working to modernize our longstanding alliances, strengthen emerging partnerships, and forge innovative links to meet today’s most urgent challenges. https://t.co/ebK0vsNpHv

Our Indo-Pacific Strategy is built on collaboration with our allies and partners across the Indo-Pacific and beyond. Together, we will tackle today's greatest issues including the climate crisis, global health, and the future of technology. Learn more: https://t.co/pBaIUWQMKK https://t.co/6G0EEX43iA
The United States’ Indo-Pacific Strategy is focused on close collaboration with allies, partners, and institutions in the region and beyond. https://t.co/DkwjemP6Ki https://t.co/IEYIrKljBG

.@SecBlinken on the COVID pandemic: We know from hard experience that as long as the virus is percolating anywhere, it may be developing new variants, and those variants may come back and defeat the defenses and remedies that we put in place. https://t.co/W0PzCNjAys https://t.co/CbH3fWGjKd

During the virtual civil society roundtable, @SecBlinken discussed contributions to the #SummitForDemocracy and commitments to this Year of Action. Commitments include support for human rights and the fight against corruption at home and abroad. For more: https://t.co/AJANBHnwrq.

The United States will continue to provide COVID-19 vaccine doses around the world through #COVAX, having already provided over 435 million safe and effective vaccines – of our commitment to donate 1.2 billion by the end of the year – at no cost. https://t.co/s8d1WC4COn

We continue to stand shoulder to shoulder with the Bolivian people by ​donating more than 1.3 million life-saving COVID-19 vaccine doses through #COVAX, bringing our total number of doses delivered to Bolivia to 4.5 million. Together we will end this pandemic. https://t.co/rVoC0Yp6WE
On this Day of Unity, we reaffirm @SecBlinken: “The territorial integrity and sovereignty of Ukraine must be protected.” https://t.co/IRJZH00fh3 https://t.co/oXcmpCowHQ

This week @EngageStage will be hosting the 13th Annual two-day virtual #HBCU Foreign Policy Conference. We look forward to engaging conversations on foreign policy, equity, career opportunities, & much more. Register here: https://t.co/DAFyej7dSJ.

The #BlackHistoryMonth trailblazer for today is Frederick Douglass, who was an activist, writer, orator, and served as the U.S. Minister to Haiti. Read more from @NMAD here: https://t.co/C4jU6qUVKX. https://t.co/fZirJHFbBX

.@POTUS: We are ready to be engaged in diplomacy with Russia and our Allies and partners to improve stability and security in Europe as a whole. And we are ready to respond decisively to a Russian attack on Ukraine. https://t.co/K0TzKzend7

.@POTUS: To the citizens of Russia: You are not our enemy. And I do not believe you want a bloody, destructive war against Ukraine — a country and a people with whom you share such deep ties of family, history, and culture. https://t.co/zrWERzsFpX
Live now! @StateDeptSpox Ned Price briefs reporters from the State Department. Also streaming live on https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/vhTOnTWMGT. https://t.co/QELz5lclFY
The United States stands #UnitedWithUkraine on this Day of Unity. 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 https://t.co/fZgIYdIi6V
Live now! @SecBlinken hosts a virtual Summit for Democracy civil society roundtable at the State Department. https://t.co/nS4fwdalTY

Today at approximately 10 a.m. EST, @SecBlinken will host a virtual Summit for Democracy civil society roundtable at the State Department. Watch live here on Twitter, https://t.co/58Uc9lZRv7, and https://t.co/K9HJKrUI2G. https://t.co/mn67fl1PNe

Why is @VP Harris encouraging U.S. private sector investment in Central America? Because more investment means greater economic opportunity, leading to more citizens that can work and prosper in their home countries. Read more from @ShareAmerica: https://t.co/QyTJncIa7c

We are donating five million Johnson & Johnson COVID-19 vaccine doses to the @_AfricanUnion’s African Vaccine Acquisition Trust. In partnership with #COVAX, we have donated more than 155 million doses to Africa. https://t.co/c8kdmlBRIR

.@SecBlinken: “Thanks to the ingenuity of modern science, we’re armed with lifesaving vaccines; millions of people are getting vaccinated each day.” We are proud to have donated 435M+ vaccines worldwide at no cost. https://t.co/9qvsO6H7iT

While millions of people are getting vaccinated each day due to ongoing global efforts to combat COVID-19, billions remain vulnerable. In partnership with our allies and partners, we will intensify our efforts and continue to work towards ending the pandemic. https://t.co/doVK9rU14D

Special Advisor Sara Minkara will virtually speak at the @GDS_Disability Summit held in Oslo from February 15-17. The U.S. remains committed to respecting the human rights of persons with disabilities around the world and promoting value-based inclusion. https://t.co/7V7xtuFrSL

We still have work to do to save lives and end the pandemic cycle in 2022, and we will continue to lead the global response with our partners. As long as the virus is spreading anywhere, it is a threat to people everywhere. Learn about our efforts: https://t.co/1BRAFjnTHE.

The COVID-19 Global Action plan will help our allies and partners close gaps in current COVID-19 response efforts, identify where and how needs can be best met, and help the world prepare against future pandemics. Read more here: https://t.co/OvUEAvloSg https://t.co/9jJJDBqDMr

Today, The American Diplomat premieres at 9 p.m. EST on @AmExperiencePBS. Funded with support from @nehgov, this documentary explores the lives and legacies of 3 African-American diplomats. #BlackHistoryMonth Watch the trailer here:  https://t.co/o9mlbmEO37

.@POTUS: The U.S & NATO are not a threat to Russia. We’re not targeting the people of Russia. To the citizens of Russia: you are not our enemies…WWII was a war of necessity. If Russia attacks Ukraine, it will be a war of choice – a war without cause or reason. The truth matters. https://t.co/gU4dLQ5Oke
Live now! President Biden provides an update on Russia and Ukraine, from the White House.  https://t.co/PZT7ECZ94f

.@SecBlinken: If Russia is genuinely interested in resolving this crisis of its own making through diplomacy and dialogue, we are prepared to do that. That’s our preferred path. It’s the right and responsible thing to do.  But it must take place in the context of deescalation. https://t.co/28CO2Nmdbw
U.S. Chargé d'Affaires Kristina Kvien is in Lviv and stands #UnitedWithUkraine.

.@SecBlinken: If Moscow chooses the path of aggression and further invades Ukraine, the response from the United States and our allies and partners will be swift, it will be united, it will be severe. https://t.co/CxJcEvWeJt
